data.label: Alert Acknowledger
data.description: Clicks 'dismiss' professionally. Has achieved inbox zero by ignoring everything.

data.label: False Positive Hunter
data.description: Tuned the SIEM once. Made it worse. Now everything is a false positive.

data.label: Compliance Checkbox Specialist
data.description: 'We're SOC2 compliant.' (They are not.)

data.label: Threat Feed Collector
data.description: Subscribed to 40 feeds. Reads none. Dashboards look impressive though.

data.label: Incident Postmortem Author
data.description: Writes detailed postmortems. Learns nothing. Same incident next quarter.

data.label: Pentest PDF Archiver
data.description: Has 200 penetration test reports. Zero remediations. 'We'll get to it.'

data.label: Unused IDS Monitor
data.description: The IDS has been in 'learning mode' for three years.

data.label: EDR Whisperer
data.description: The one person who actually knows what the agent does. Feared. Respected.

data.label: Firewall Rule Archaeologist
data.description: Excavates ancient rules. 'Allow any any' from 2009. Nobody knows why.

data.label: Password Policy Enforcer
data.description: Requires 47 character passwords. Changed monthly. Wonders why everyone uses sticky notes.

data.label: VPN Troubleshooter
data.description: 'Have you tried disconnecting and reconnecting?' Has said this 10,000 times.

data.label: Certificate Expiry Ignorer
data.description: The alerts have been firing for months. 'It's on the backlog.'

data.label: YAML Farmer
data.description: Tends vast fields of indentation. One space off and the harvest fails.

data.label: Jenkins Shaman
data.description: The pipeline is 9000 lines. Nobody dares touch it. It works. Sometimes.

data.label: Kubernetes Theorist
data.description: Has never run kubectl. Has opinions about service meshes. Strong opinions.

data.label: VM Sprawl Curator
data.description: 900 VMs. 12 are used. The rest are 'probably important.'

data.label: Technical Debt Ranger
data.description: Assigned to 'quick fix' from 2019. Still ranging.

data.label: BGP Berserker
data.description: Once null-routed a continent. Would do it again.

data.label: Cable Archaeologist
data.description: Traces cables through the ceiling void. Finds things. Terrible things.

data.label: DNS Wizard
data.description: It's always DNS. Always. They know this. They've accepted it.
